---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
---

# Nicholas Gladwell

I’m interested in computational approaches to pharmacology, including receptor-ligand interactions and pharmacokinetic modeling.

---

## Bio

---

## Projects

### 5-HT2A vs 5-HT2B Comparison

Exploring structural differences between serotonin receptor subtypes and their implications for drug design.

[View Project →](Portfolio1.qmd)
